_meta.name: Bible Translations API Index
_meta.description: Central translation API index for the Bible HTML website. Fetch any translation's full Bible content from its rawUrl. Supports Verse Generator, Read Bible, Search, Voice Reading, Image Generation, and more.

instructions.loadTranslation: Fetch the translation's rawUrl to get the full Bible JSON. Cache it under cacheKeyPrefix + abbreviation.
instructions.bookList: After fetching, read the top-level keys of the JSON to build the book list dynamically.
instructions.chapters: Read the keys inside books[bookName] to get chapter numbers.
instructions.verses: Read the keys inside books[bookName][chapter] to get verse numbers.
instructions.verseOfDay: Pick a random book → random chapter → random verse from the loaded translation.
instructions.verseOfWeek: Same as verseOfDay but seed with ISO week number for consistency.
instructions.search: Iterate all books/chapters/verses of the loaded translation and match the query string.
instructions.missingContent: If a book/chapter/verse key does not exist in the fetched data, show: 'This content is not available in [translationName].'
instructions.duplicateGuard: Before adding a translation to the cache, check cacheKeyPrefix + abbreviation first.
instructions.rtl: Set dir='rtl' on the reading container when isRTL is true.
instructions.voiceReading: Use the language BCP-47 tag from the voiceLang field for SpeechSynthesis.lang.
instructions.imageGeneration: Use translationName + abbreviation as the watermark/credit line on generated verse images.

translations.translationName: King James Version with Strong's Numbers

uiMessages.notAvailable: This content is not available in {translation}.
uiMessages.loadError: Could not load {translation}. Please check your connection and try again.
